message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Fixing resource leak: wrap context creation in _resolve_context with 'with' statements to close file handles during shell completion

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Implementing validate_nesting param on Context to detect unclosed child contexts; touching Context.__init__, _make_sub_context, close, __exit__, and shell_completion _resolve_context

type: INTENT
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: core.py: added validate_nesting param+_children tracking to Context.__init__/_make_sub_context/close(). shell_completion.py: about to add explicit validate_nesting=False kwarg to the 3 make_context() calls inside _resolve_context (lines ~547,560,571) - just adding a kwarg, not restructuring control flow, so your 'with' wrapping should layer fine on top; shout if it clashes

type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Done: wrapped all 3 make_context() calls in _resolve_context with 'with' statements (cli.make_context as ctx, cmd.make_context as sub_ctx/sub_sub_ctx), matching upstream click 8.2.0 fix; core.py untouched since Context.__enter__/__exit__/close already exist here. Your validate_nesting kwarg should merge fine on the same call sites, just re-indented inside the with headers.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Finished validate_nesting feature: Context.__init__ gains validate_nesting param + _children tracking list, _make_sub_context propagates it and registers children, close()/exit raise RuntimeError on unclosed children and de-register from parent on close; shell_completion._resolve_context passes validate_nesting=False at all 3 make_context call sites. Full suite green. Writing patch.txt now.
